fullArticle:
Super typhoon as wide as France heads to East Asia

As Super Typhoon Bavi approaches, residents in Taiwan, Japan and China have been stockpiling supplies and closing businesses. Hundreds of fishing boats have rushed back to port to shelter from the storm, while flights and ferries have been cancelled....
